HRs, Please Stop Hiring Unicorns 🦄 Yesterday, I received a job description for an Application Security Engineer role. The JD was 3 pages long. The candidate was expected to have expertise in: Web Security,API Security,Android Security, iOS Security,Networ &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
